task_completion.description: Load the original Hubble image ngc6652_555w.fits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ, another FITS viewer, or a Python script shows the file ngc6652_555w.fits being opened or loaded from ~/AstroImages/noise_mapping/.

task_completion.description: Apply the CCD noise equation to calculate the variance.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A math dialog, macro, or script showing the calculation: multiplying the image by 7.12 (Gain) and adding 27.4576 (Read Noise squared, or 5.24^2).

task_completion.description: Save the resulting Variance Map to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal command showing 'variance_map.fits' created in ~/AstroImages/noise_mapping/.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Error Map by taking the square root of the variance map.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A math dialog, macro, or script showing a square root operation (and ideally clipping negative values to 0) being applied to the variance map data.

task_completion.description: Save the resulting Error Map to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, file manager, or terminal command showing 'error_map.fits' created in ~/AstroImages/noise_mapping/.

task_completion.description: Measure the mean pixel value of the error map and record it in results.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing 'results.txt' in the target directory containing the exact string format 'MEAN_ERROR: <value>'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually processed the FITS image data rather than creating empty files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show genuine image processing software (like AstroImageJ) or a script (like Python/astropy) performing math on pixel arrays, not just 'touch' commands to create empty .fits files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the explicitly provided parameters rather than extracting them from the FITS header.
integrity.visual_evidence: The math operations must explicitly use Gain = 7.12 and Read Noise = 5.24 (or 27.4576). The agent should not use the FITS header values (which are actually 15 and ~8.32).

integrity.description: Verify the agent measured the mean value before writing it.
integrity.visual_evidence: An image statistics window, measurement table, or script output should be visible showing the calculated mean of the error map before it is typed into results.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target directory: /home/ga/AstroImages/noise_mapping. Expected variance constant (Read_Noise^2) is 27.4576. The agent MUST use the explicitly provided Gain (7.12) and Read Noise (5.24) from the prompt, even though the actual FITS header contains different values. Expected output files are variance_map.fits, error_map.fits, and results.txt containing 'MEAN_ERROR: <value>'.
